allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; $env:PATH -split ";" | Select-String -Pattern "node" -SimpleMatch)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\npm.cmd" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; where.exe node 2>$null; where.exe npm 2>$null)
